name: orca_purge_initial
diff_explanation: Round 2 commit 710bd09 lowered initial_purge_length from 150mm to 80mm. Baseline FLUSH=0 splits 150mm into 2 chunks of 75mm each (75+2=77mm extruded with retract); current emits one 80mm chunk (80+2=82mm extruded with retract). PRZ_SPITTING_START still primes 55mm before this on both, so total filament passing the nozzle is 75+75+55=205mm baseline vs 80+55=135mm current. Documented user-approved change.
